mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_comment (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.post_id, c.user_id, c.content, c.created_at, u.nickname AS userNickname FROM post_comment c JOIN user_info u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_comment WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_favorite_post (user_id, post_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{postId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_favorite_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite_post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND post_id = #{postId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_favorite_post WHERE user_id = #{userId}
